name: rids_match_add_rid_extends_both
code:
proof fn phi_1_rids_match_add_rid_extends_both(
    bools: Seq<Option<ReqId>>,
    rids: Seq<ReqId>,
    bools_start: nat,
    bools_end: nat,
    rids_start: nat,
    rids_end: nat,
    rid: ReqId,
)
    requires
        0 <= bools_start <= bools_end <= bools.len(),
        0 <= rids_start <= rids_end <= rids.len(),
        rids_match(bools, rids, bools_start, bools_end, rids_start, rids_end),
    ensures
        rids_match(
            bools.push(Option::Some(rid)),
            rids.push(rid),
            bools_start,
            (bools_end + 1) as nat,
            rids_start,
            (rids_end + 1) as nat,
        ),
{
    rids_match_add_rid(bools, rids, bools_start, bools_end, rids_start, rids_end, rid);
    // After push, bools_new[bools_end] == Some(rid) and rids_new[rids_end] == rid
}
reason: Pushing `Some(rid)` and extending both windows by 1 preserves the match — tests that appending a matched pair extends the relation

name: rids_match_add_rid_idempotent_window
code:
proof fn phi_5_rids_match_add_rid_idempotent_window(
    bools: Seq<Option<ReqId>>,
    rids: Seq<ReqId>,
    bools_start: nat,
    bools_end: nat,
    rids_start: nat,
    rids_end: nat,
    rid1: ReqId,
    rid2: ReqId,
)
    requires
        0 <= bools_start <= bools_end <= bools.len(),
        0 <= rids_start <= rids_end <= rids.len(),
        rids_match(bools, rids, bools_start, bools_end, rids_start, rids_end),
    ensures
        rids_match(
            bools.push(Option::Some(rid1)).push(Option::Some(rid2)),
            rids.push(rid1).push(rid2),
            bools_start,
            bools_end,
            rids_start,
            rids_end,
        ),
{
    rids_match_add_rid(bools, rids, bools_start, bools_end, rids_start, rids_end, rid1);
    let bools1 = bools.push(Option::Some(rid1));
    let rids1 = rids.push(rid1);
    rids_match_add_rid(bools1, rids1, bools_start, bools_end, rids_start, rids_end, rid2);
}
reason: Pushing two rid pairs preserves the original window match — the original `[bools_start, bools_end)` window is unaffected by appending beyond it
